mapper.select: SELECT noti_id, noti_type, sender_email, message, target_id, read_yn, created_at FROM notifications WHERE user_email = #{userEmail} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET read_yn = 'Y' WHERE user_email = #{userEmail} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_email, noti_type, sender_email, message, target_id, read_yn, deleted_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{userEmail}, #{notiType}, #{senderEmail}, #{message}, #{targetId}, 'N', 'N', NOW())
